title: TikTok Comments Scraper
description: Extract comments from a public TikTok video URL.

url.title: TikTok Video URL
url.description: Full TikTok video URL to fetch comments from.

count.title: Comments Per Page
count.description: Number of comments to return from this page. Scrappa accepts 1-50.

cursor.title: Cursor
cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous run. Leave empty for the first page.
